Acta v0.2.0 record · Generated from accepted canonical state (.agent-work/tag-filter/build-with-notes/session.md) after explicit acceptance (explicit chat confirmation after candidate export) · Never generated from browser state.

stop-gate record · Approved — STOP-01 resolved: reject the addition

Implementation session: tag filtering, STOP-01 resolved

STOP-01 was resolved by rejecting the mid-session remote tag-suggestion request, and the resolution was explicitly accepted in chat. Three of five slices were green at the pause; the approved plan resumes with Slices 4 and 5. The remote-API idea is preserved as an unresolved item, not built. No production behavior was changed by this record.

01Resolved STOP gate

STOP-01 — Remote tag-suggestion API contradicts the approved non-goals

Resolution: Reject the addition, continue the approved plan — Slices 4 and 5 proceed as specified; the remote-API idea is logged as unresolved, not built.

Rationale: The remote tag-suggestion API contradicts an approved non-goal; widening scope mid-build would bypass the change-blueprint gates. Keep the approved 5-slice plan and log the idea as unresolved.. Accepted via chat: "reject the remote API, continue the plan" after reviewing the candidate export.

Why work stopped: The approved specification lists "no network calls; the 3-skill catalog is static" as a non-goal. Mid-session you asked to also fetch tag suggestions from a remote API. Building that now would silently widen the accepted scope, so the plan is paused before Slice 4.

Next authorized action at acceptance: Work is paused at STOP-01; no further slices run until the gate resolves.

02Session timeline

Every session entry that preceded the resolution, in order
TimeTypeEntry
13:48PlanApproved 5-slice plan loaded
The implementation plan from change-blueprint was confirmed: five vertical slices building tag filtering on the functional-core shape from three-code-paths.
13:55CheckBaseline suite green before edits (pass)
node --test ran clean on the untouched tree to establish a red/green baseline.
14:02PlanSlice 1 — pure filterByTag done
filterByTag(skills, tag) landed test-first as a plain importable function with its own assertions.
14:09CheckSlice 1 checks (pass)
Four assertions cover the null-tag, matching-tag, and no-match cases.
14:18PlanSlice 2 — pure parseTagFromSearch done
parseTagFromSearch(search) reads the single ?tag= param via URLSearchParams and returns tag or null.
14:26DiscoveryExisting visibleSkills() already sorts
The catalog's visibleSkills() sorts before returning, so filterByTag must run before the sort to keep ordering stable.
14:34PlanSlice 3 — static markup done
The no-JS catalog list renders every skill with its tags so the page is complete before any script runs.
14:38CheckChecks after Slice 3 (pass)
Twelve node --test assertions pass; typecheck is clean.
14:47DeviationUnknown-tag fallback needs a membership check (needed a human)
Slice 4 would render an empty list for an unknown ?tag=; the spec is silent on whether that should fall back to the full catalog.
14:52STOPSTOP-01 — remote tag-suggestion API is out of the approved scope (needed a human)
The mid-session request to fetch tag suggestions from a remote API contradicts an approved non-goal, so building is paused for a decision.

03Checks at close

Progress was 3 of 5 slices green, paused before Slice 4 — URL-driven filter wiring
CheckStateDetail
node --testpass12 assertions pass
typecheckpassclean

04Changed files

  • src/catalog.mjs
  • src/url-tag.mjs
  • src/app.mjs
  • test/catalog.test.mjs

05Unresolved at acceptance

  • unknown-tag URL fallback needs a membership check before Slice 4 renders
  • control style, density, and empty-state copy remain with interface-directions

Sources

  1. [E1] .agent-work/tag-filter/change-blueprint/specification.md

  3. [E3] .agent-work/tag-filter/three-code-paths/code-paths.md
  4. [E4] src/catalog.mjs
  5. [E5] test/catalog.test.mjs

Acta is a print-first engineering record. Fact = directly supported; Inference = reasoned from evidence; Simplification = deliberately reduced model. This record renders accepted canonical state only; open decisions live in the companion instrument.
